title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netmeds - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netmeds - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
